mainEntity.name: How long does it take for Phoenix firms to see AI referral traffic after profile updates?
mainEntity.text: How long does it take for Phoenix firms to see AI referral traffic after profile updates?

acceptedAnswer.text: Phoenix firms may see AI referral increases in 2-6 weeks after updating directories and adding schema, as crawlers index changes and review patterns solidify.[3][2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Timeline varies: immediate for Google indexes, 2-4 weeks for directory propagation to AI models, up to 6 weeks for review signals. Monitor via analytics for 'ChatGPT referral' spikes. Phoenix market competitive—consistent updates needed. Delays if NAP inconsistencies exist. Clients or insurers verify via same AIs; speed builds trust edge.[2][3]

name: Timeline for AI Referral Boost in Phoenix
description: Phoenix firms may see AI referral increases in 2-6 weeks after updating directories and adding schema, as crawlers index changes and review patterns solidify.[3
